description: Create an interactive dashboard named 'IP_Investigation_Tool' in the Search app for Tier 1 analysts to investigate suspicious IP addresses. The dashboard must include a text input with the token 'target_ip' (default '*') and a dropdown input with the token 'target_index' (default '*', choices: 'security_logs', 'web_logs'). Include at least two visualization panels, such as an activity timeline chart and a recent logs table, where both panel queries dynamically use the tokens (e.g., index=$target_index$ $target_ip$). Log in to Splunk at http://localhost:8000 using username 'admin' and password 'SplunkAdmin1!'.
